qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of installing FreeSurfer in a shared folder?
qa_pairs.answer: Installing FreeSurfer in a shared folder (like /project) makes the code available for any other member of the group.

qa_pairs.question: Where will FreeSurfer be installed when using the shared folder installation method?
qa_pairs.answer: FreeSurfer will be installed under the directory `/home/$USER/projects/def-someuser/$USER/software`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the location of the module when FreeSurfer is installed in a shared folder?
qa_pairs.answer: The module will be installed under the user's directory `/home/$USER/.local/easybuild/modules/2020/Core/freesurfer`.

qa_pairs.question: Which command is used to change to a shared project group before installing FreeSurfer in a shared folder?
What variable is used to define the installation directory for a shared FreeSurfer setup?
What variable specifies the module directory for a shared FreeSurfer installation?
